summary_one_line: A valid sfnt header plus a GSUB/GPOS table whose language defines a required-feature index, so required_feature_index != NO_FEATURE_INDEX.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A well-formed sfnt font: the magic header 00 01 00 00 followed by a four-byte table tag 'GSUB'/'GPOS' and the structured offset/index fields (e.g. 00 00 00 18 00 02 1f 08) that let HarfBuzz parse a layout table whose language record carries a required-feature index, so required_feature_index[table_index] != HB_OT_LAYOUT_NO_FEATURE_INDEX takes the true branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds begin with the TrueType magic 00 01 00 00 and embed the literal table tags 'GPOS'/'GSUB' (47 50 4f 53 / 47 53 55 42) at offset 0x0c plus the recurring offset/structure bytes 00 00 00 18 00 02 1f 08, exactly the byte pattern a layout-table parse needs to populate a required-feature index.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds are short or garbage (6-byte 87 0e 0d 0e 22 0e, 13-byte e0 17 ..., or e0/ff-filled buffers) lacking both the 00 01 00 00 sfnt magic and any 'GSUB'/'GPOS' tag, so no layout table is parsed and required_feature_index stays NO_FEATURE_INDEX (false branch), as the per-role overlay shows the true-side call to add_lookups never executes for L.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer of the table-tag and header comparisons (HB_TAG('G','S','U','B') etc.) and substitutes the exact comparison operand into the input at the matching offset, manufacturing the 'GSUB'/'GPOS' tag and sfnt magic that naive/value_profile cannot synthesize by blind havoc; both decisive pairs differ from their loser only by the presence of I2SRandReplace.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked true side at L331 tests required_feature_index against HB_OT_LAYOUT_NO_FEATURE_INDEX, and the true side calls add_lookups with required_feature_index.
Only winner-resolving seeds reach the true-branch add_lookups call.
Winner-resolving seeds carry the sfnt magic and the GPOS/GSUB table tag.
A winner seed embeds the GSUB tag and the recurring layout-structure offset bytes.
Loser-blocking seeds are tiny garbage buffers without sfnt magic or a table tag.
The byte diff shows W concentrates the GPOS/GSUB tag bytes at offsets 0x0c-0x0f while L does not.
cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes a CMP operand into the input at matching offsets, on top of naive's mutators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so the vpc>vp pair isolates the same I2S technique.
Both decisive pairs are I2S deltas (vpc>vp and cmplog>naive).

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5589 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed aa6f47881154f74f` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 18 of the 19-level ancestor chain (ancestor e0a5b09f80625fb6), the lower-bound signal of an I2SRandReplace find in the vpc winner's lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the sfnt-magic + GSUB/GPOS-tag gate removed (tag compared via a non-instrumented path) in which cmplog still resolves the branch significantly faster than naive would refute the I2S-substitution mechanism.

weakest_evidence_point: Whether the decisive comparison I2S substitutes is the table-tag/sfnt-magic CMP specifically, versus some downstream language-record field that produces required_feature_index, is inferred from byte layout, not directly traced.
